nodes.label: Language & Text
nodes.description: Tools whose primary modality is natural language.

children.label: Generation
children.description: Tools that produce new text (chat, writing, code, summarization).

children.label: Analysis & Classification
children.description: Tools that analyse, label, or extract structure from existing text.

children.label: Translation & Localisation
children.description: Tools focused on cross-lingual transfer and cultural adaptation.

children.label: Search & Retrieval
children.description: Tools for semantic search, document retrieval, and Q&A over corpora.

nodes.label: Vision & Image
nodes.description: Tools whose primary modality is visual (still images).

children.label: Image Generation
children.description: Tools that synthesise new images from prompts or references.

children.label: Image Understanding
children.description: Tools that interpret, describe, or extract information from images.

children.label: Image Enhancement
children.description: Tools that improve, restore, or transform image quality.

nodes.label: Audio & Speech
nodes.description: Tools whose primary modality is audio or spoken language.

children.label: Speech Processing
children.description: Tools for recognising, synthesising, or transforming human speech.

children.label: Music & Sound Generation
children.description: Tools that compose, generate, or edit music and general audio.

nodes.label: Video & Animation
nodes.description: Tools whose primary modality is video or motion graphics.

children.label: Video Generation
children.description: Tools that create video from text, images, or other signals.

children.label: Video Editing & Enhancement
children.description: Tools for automated editing, dubbing, captioning, or upscaling of video.

nodes.label: Multimodal
nodes.description: Tools that combine two or more modalities as a core feature.

children.label: Cross-Modal Understanding
children.description: Tools that jointly reason over multiple input modalities.

children.label: Cross-Modal Generation
children.description: Tools that generate output in a different modality from the input.

nodes.label: Data & Analytics
nodes.description: Tools focused on structured data, forecasting, and analytical reasoning.

children.label: Data Processing & Transformation
children.description: Tools that clean, transform, or enrich structured datasets.

children.label: Predictive Analytics
children.description: Tools that forecast outcomes or detect anomalies in data.

children.label: Natural Language to Data
children.description: Tools that translate natural language queries into structured queries or insights.

nodes.label: Agents & Automation
nodes.description: Tools that autonomously plan, act, and complete multi-step tasks.

children.label: Task Automation
children.description: Tools that automate repetitive workflows within a single application.

children.label: Autonomous Agents
children.description: Tools that operate as LLM-driven agents with tool use and long-horizon planning.

children.label: Workflow Orchestration
children.description: Tools for building, chaining, and managing multi-agent or multi-step pipelines.

nodes.label: Developer Infrastructure
nodes.description: Tools for building, deploying, evaluating, and monitoring AI systems.

children.label: Model Serving & Deployment
children.description: Tools for hosting and serving ML models in production.

children.label: LLM Ops & Evaluation
children.description: Tools for prompt management, evaluation, observability, and guardrails.

children.label: Fine-Tuning & Training
children.description: Tools for adapting pre-trained models to custom tasks or datasets.

children.label: Vector & Embedding Infrastructure
children.description: Tools that store, index, and query vector embeddings at scale.
